goal: eval ep_length >= 400 on tomato soup can @ 5N (deterministic, 5 eps)

experiments.result: eval=24.8 @300k, training ep_len=30.8 still rising, RETRY
eval=18.2 @300k, FAIL — worse than baseline. C3 resolved: n_steps=512 wins.

C1.statement: PPO + 45D obs can learn to hold better than random, given enough gradient updates
C1.reason: exp1 shows 24.8 vs baseline 19.8 (+25%) with 300k steps, training ep_len still rising at end — policy IS learning, needs more steps

C2.statement: Curriculum on force_mag (low -> high) reaches target ep_length faster than fixed-force
C2.reason: Testing in exp3: phase A 150k at 1N then phase B 150k at 5N with warm-start

C3.statement: n_steps=512 or 1024 beats n_steps=2048 within 300k step budget
C3.reason: exp1 (n_steps=512) = 24.8 beats exp2 (n_steps=1024) = 18.2 and sanity-01 (n_steps=2048) = 19.8. Use n_steps=512 going forward.

C4.statement: Lower INTERP_STEPS_PER_KF increases fps without hurting grasp stability
C4.reason: commit ab47cb7 reduced 200->80 + settle 100->20 before sanity-01 run; exp1 and exp2 both hit 26-27 fps stably
